description: The Cartel de los Soles is a term used to describe criminal networks of drug trafficking and corruption within the Bolivarian National Armed Forces of Venezuela, allegedly emerging in the early 1990s. It involves high-ranking military and political officials, including Nicolás Maduro and Diosdado Cabello, accused of international drug trafficking, terrorism, and state corruption. The organization is not a traditional cartel but a series of disconnected cells within the Venezuelan military. Its existence is disputed, with some experts and UN reports denying its formal structure.

country_links.evidence_quote: Territorio: Estados Unidos , Venezuela , Bolivia , Colombia , Cuba , México y Nicaragua
country_links.context: The Cartel de los Soles has territory in Bolivia.

country_links.evidence_quote: los cargamentos de drogas eran enviados desde Colombia por la antigua guerrilla de las FARC-EP
country_links.context: The organization sources drugs from Colombia, sent by former FARC-EP guerrillas.

country_links.evidence_quote: Territorio: Estados Unidos , Venezuela , Bolivia , Colombia , Cuba , México y Nicaragua
country_links.context: The Cartel de los Soles has territory in Cuba.

country_links.evidence_quote: manejar el envío de cocaína a República Dominicana a través de lanchas
country_links.context: The organization ships cocaine to the Dominican Republic via boats.

country_links.evidence_quote: colocó 31 maletas que contenían 1,3 toneladas de cocaína en un vuelo a París
country_links.context: The Cartel de los Soles sent 1.3 tons of cocaine to Paris via Air France flight 385.

country_links.evidence_quote: traficar 800 kilos de cocaína de alta pureza desde Venezuela a los Estados Unidos, vía Honduras
country_links.context: The Cartel de los Soles routed cocaine from Venezuela to the United States via Honduras.

country_links.evidence_quote: Fue detenido en mayo de 2021 en una pensión de Casalvieri... Italia
country_links.context: A member of the organization was detained in Italy and extradited.
